positive: Minimalist illustration of a crescent moon and stylized constellation patterns, set against a dark, cosmic background. The design uses clean, geometric linework and varying thicknesses of lines to create depth. Main subject is the Moon, centrally placed and dominant. Color palette restricted to celestial deep blues, vibrant electric teal, and luminous gold foil accents. Use a high contrast, flat graphic style with thick, clean outlines and elegant silhouettes. Perfect for screen printing or DTG printing on apparel. Celestial elements should feel magical yet sophisticated. Highly detailed, vector art style, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, grainy, photorealistic, watermark, text, logo, writing, signature, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, messy, grunge, noise, chromatic aberration
